TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Guangfu, title = Guangfu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Guangfu} }

S.FORM: Guangfu mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 131.63 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 28.44 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.67 km²), 10,741 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,865 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 6,982 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 65%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Guangfu ays psgayun 14 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Tafalong , Fata' an , Laso'ay , Alolong , Sado , Kalotong , O kakay , Atomo , Fahol .

Guangfu mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 131.63 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 28.44 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.67 km²), 10,741 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,865 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 6,982 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 65%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Guangfu ays psgayun 14 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Tafalong , Fata' an , Laso'ay , Alolong , Sado , Kalotong , O kakay , Atomo , Fahol .
S.PHON: ɣuaŋ*u mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), **,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu ɣuaŋ*u ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, ta*aloŋ , *ataʔ an , las~ɕoʔaj , aloloŋ , s~ɕa*o , kalotoŋ , o kakaj , atomo , *aħol .
